title: Electronic Diagnostics
description: Full OBD-II and manufacturer-level fault code scanning for all vehicle makes and models. Pinpoint the problem before spending a cent.

title: Auto Electrical Repairs
description: Complete electrical system repairs — wiring harnesses, fuse boxes, shorts, and circuit troubleshooting.

title: Starters & Alternators
description: Repair and replacement of starter motors and alternators. Quick turnaround to get you back on the road.

title: Rewiring
description: Full or partial vehicle rewiring for damaged, corroded, or faulty wiring looms. Factory-standard workmanship.

title: Car Servicing
description: Scheduled maintenance services — oil changes, filter replacements, fluid top-ups, and general inspections.

title: Aircon Re-Gas
description: Air conditioning re-gas, leak detection, and compressor diagnostics. Stay cool in the Pretoria heat.

title: Breakdown Assistance
description: Emergency field service for breakdowns. We come to you — home, office, or roadside in the greater Pretoria area.

title: Battery Testing & Replacement
description: Load testing, terminal cleaning, and battery replacement. We stock popular sizes for same-day fitting.
